F105 Rule 34.30(9) omitted (22.4.2014) by virtue of The Family Procedure (Amendment No.3) Rules 2013 (S.I. 2013/3204) , rules 1 , 127(f) (with rule 137 ); S.I. 2014/954 , art. 2


#### Appeal from a decision relating to registration E+W


34.31. —(1) This rule applies to an appeal under—


[ F108 (2) The appeal must be to the family court.


(Practice Direction 34E makes provision in relation to such cases.) ]


Textual Amendments


F106 Rules 34.31(1)(a)-(d) omitted (31.12.2020) by virtue of The Family Procedure Rules 2010 and Court of Protection Rules 2017 (Amendment) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019 (S.I. 2019/517) , regs. 1(1) , 19(10) (with reg. 27 ) (as amended by S.I. 2020/1574 , regs. 1 , 4(2) and S.I. 2020/1493 , regs. 1(1) , 8(2)(f) ); 2020 c. 1 , Sch. 5 para. 1(1)
